leaf_done_definition: scoped implementation or documentation is complete
leaf-specific tests or validations are present
relevant targeted tests or validations pass
full-suite run passes when blast radius requires it

leaves.title: Audit and reconcile normative authority docs
leaves.scope: Reconcile all top-level doctrine and remove conflict or ambiguity before broad build work.
implementation_tasks: Audit authority hierarchy and terminology.
Remove conflicting language and stale assumptions.
Lock module, feature, classifier, overlay, playbook, gate, and review definitions.
Lock docstring and package-organisation rules.
validation_tasks: Run a line-by-line conflict audit against the audited docs.
Confirm authority precedence remains consistent with docs/01_NORMATIVE.md.
Confirm the updated docs contain only absolute wording for execution rules.
leaves.pass_gate: All audited docs agree on authority, terminology, and execution order. No blocking ambiguity remains.
leaves.merge_gate: Documentation diff reviewed; no higher-precedence conflict remains.
completion_evidence: Absolute-language grep across audited docs returned no matches for may/should/could/optional/maybe/might.
Downstream gate status was reset to blocked in PLANS.md, the canonical execution plan, the leaf ledger, and the execution log.
The repo venv passed pytest -q and make check after the planning/doc updates.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `72a144d`.

leaves.title: Build the canonical import registry
leaves.scope: Merge the preservation pack and corpus-bounded Phase A outputs into one canonical import registry.
implementation_tasks: Ingest preserved modules, features, and desk-cognition fragments.
Assign canonical IDs and source-form types.
Assign maturity states and provenance records.
Preserve every recoverable item without silent deletion.
validation_tasks: Verify all preservation-pack module rows are represented.
Verify all corpus-bounded Phase A items are represented.
Verify duplicate handling keeps provenance rather than deleting meaning.
leaves.pass_gate: The canonical import registry covers the full corpus-bounded universe with no-loss evidence and does not overstate runtime completion for concept-contract or evidence-only items.
leaves.merge_gate: Coverage report, canonical registry, and maturity counts are complete, parseable, and truthfully scoped.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `fff369e`.

leaves.title: Map the import registry into the Desk Cognition Grammar and runtime architecture
leaves.scope: Assign every canonical item to grammar role, technical architecture role, and runtime target.
implementation_tasks: Map every canonical item into grammar position.
Map every canonical item into raw input, derived state, classifier, posture gate, playbook qualifier, execution component, or review component.
Flag items already implemented, partially represented, absent, or evidence-only.
validation_tasks: Confirm no canonical item remains unmapped.
Confirm no runtime role conflicts with the normative architecture.
leaves.pass_gate: Every canonical item has one grammar role and one architecture role, and no orphan item remains.
leaves.merge_gate: Mapping artefacts parse, show zero orphan items, and keep evidence-only items outside runtime completion counts.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `a58c853`.

leaves.title: Define common module contracts and runtime loader scaffolding
leaves.scope: Add common interfaces, loader rules, and trace packet contracts for imported modules.
implementation_tasks: Define common contract schemas for module inputs and outputs.
Define loader or registry surfaces for canonical items.
Define explanation and trace packet contracts.
Add docstring requirements to the touched code surfaces.
validation_tasks: Add targeted unit tests for the contract schemas and loader behaviour.
Add parsing or import tests for the new registry surfaces.
leaves.pass_gate: The runtime scaffold loads deterministic contracts, emits trace-ready outputs, and the repo venv passes the full suite.
leaves.merge_gate: Touched code is docstring-complete and the repo remains green.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `e30d3ed`.
acceptance_criteria: All seven binding grammar layers will expose deterministic runtime contracts in the correct execution order.
Every runtime layer contract will require a docstring-backed service path and explicit input/output model names.
Trace-stage packet construction will be contract-backed and deterministic.

leaves.title: Import temporal context tranche
leaves.scope: Implement or refactor temporal-context modules and feature families first.
implementation_tasks: Import session-clock, expiry-proximity, and event-proximity logic into the contract-first runtime.
Refactor surviving code instead of duplicating it.
Add clear docstrings to every touched module.
validation_tasks: Add targeted unit tests for temporal state classification.
Add targeted integration tests for pipeline consumption of temporal context.
leaves.pass_gate: Temporal context is deterministic, test-covered, and increases implemented-runtime depth for the temporal grammar role.
leaves.merge_gate: Relevant targeted tests pass and no contract regression is introduced.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `5661ea1`.
acceptance_criteria: Temporal context will classify session phase, expiry-cycle state, and event-proximity state deterministically.
Temporal outputs will preserve recent-path tags for flush, squeeze, and prior-session context.
All touched temporal code surfaces will retain explicit docstrings.

leaves.title: Import market-regime tranche
leaves.scope: Implement or refactor beta, breadth, vol-regime, and cross-asset market-state layers.
implementation_tasks: Import regime-context modules from the canonical mapping.
Expose deterministic state packets for downstream posture and playbook logic.
Maintain explicit docstrings and contract compliance.
validation_tasks: Add targeted tests for regime classification and cross-asset state assembly.
Add tests that confirm upstream temporal context is consumed correctly.
test_commands: pytest -q tests -k regime or market_state or risk
leaves.pass_gate: Market-regime context is deterministic, test-covered, and increases implemented-runtime depth for the regime grammar role.
leaves.merge_gate: Relevant targeted tests pass and explanation surfaces remain intact.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `452c36a`.
acceptance_criteria: Market regime context will classify beta residuals, volatility regime, vol-of-vol state, breadth, and sector leadership deterministically.
Cross-asset pressure will remain explicit rather than hidden inside downstream risk logic.
All touched regime code surfaces will retain explicit docstrings.

leaves.title: Import options-and-flow tranche
leaves.scope: Implement or refactor options-state, skew, term-structure, gamma, and flow layers as first-class context.
implementation_tasks: Import options and flow modules from the canonical mapping.
Define contract surfaces for chain snapshots, derived options state, and explanatory outputs.
Keep options data first-class rather than a secondary overlay.
validation_tasks: Add targeted tests for chain-state derivation, skew, term structure, and gamma-context outputs.
Add integration tests proving downstream layers receive options context.
test_commands: pytest -q tests -k options or skew or gamma or flow
leaves.pass_gate: Options-and-flow context is deterministic, test-covered on positive and negative paths, and materially increases implemented-runtime depth for the options grammar role.
leaves.merge_gate: Touched code is docstring-complete and the full suite remains green.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `a2c7534`.
acceptance_criteria: Options and flow context will expose term structure, skew, gamma, IV-vs-RV, pin-risk, dealer-pressure, and options-behaviour states deterministically.
Options data will remain first-class rather than a secondary overlay.
All touched options-flow code surfaces will retain explicit docstrings.

leaves.title: Import posture-and-risk tranche
leaves.scope: Implement posture, permission, inventory-aware gating, and deployable-capital governance.
implementation_tasks: Import or refactor posture and risk modules into the current decision hierarchy.
Make inventory state and fresh deployable capital explicit runtime fields.
Ensure no downstream allocation bypasses upstream permission.
validation_tasks: Add targeted tests for permission, derisk, block, no-overnight, and deployable-capital behaviour.
Add end-to-end tests for veto propagation into downstream execution surfaces.
test_commands: pytest -q tests -k risk or allocation or deployment
leaves.pass_gate: Posture-and-risk logic is deterministic, inventory-aware, test-covered on positive and negative paths, and materially increases implemented-runtime depth for the posture grammar role.
leaves.merge_gate: The repo remains green and no allocation path bypasses posture and risk.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `bb9e3ab`.

leaves.title: Import playbook-eligibility tranche
leaves.scope: Implement classifiers and gates that decide which playbooks are eligible, invalid, or watch-only.
implementation_tasks: Translate preserved playbook concepts into eligibility surfaces.
Keep concept-contracts for ideas that still await dependencies.
Expose eligibility outcomes to downstream execution and review packets.
validation_tasks: Add targeted tests for playbook qualification, invalidation, and watch-only outcomes.
Add tests proving eligibility reacts to upstream regime and options context.
test_commands: pytest -q tests -k playbook or classifier or eligibility
leaves.pass_gate: Playbook eligibility logic covers more than scaffold stubs, is test-covered on positive and negative paths, and materially increases implemented-runtime depth for the playbook grammar role.
leaves.merge_gate: Relevant tests pass and eligibility outputs appear in trace packets.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `18c5757`.
acceptance_criteria: Playbook eligibility will expose more than the initial three playbooks and will classify eligible, watch-only, and ineligible states deterministically.
Preserved playbook concepts will map into runtime eligibility surfaces without pretending that every preserved idea is already executable.
All touched playbook code surfaces will retain explicit docstrings.

leaves.title: Import expression-and-execution tranche
leaves.scope: Implement or refactor entry shape, laddering, sizing, hedge, and exit modules under the new grammar.
implementation_tasks: Translate preserved execution concepts into deterministic runtime modules.
Maintain risk-first hierarchy and explicit explanation outputs.
Refactor surviving ladder and carry logic where useful rather than treating it as sacred.
validation_tasks: Add targeted tests for expression, scaling, exits, and hedge requirements.
Add integration tests proving execution logic only activates after playbook eligibility and permission.
test_commands: pytest -q tests -k execution or ladder or carry or hedge
leaves.pass_gate: Expression-and-execution logic is deterministic, inventory-aware, test-covered on positive and negative paths, and materially increases implemented-runtime depth for the execution grammar role.
leaves.merge_gate: The repo remains green and execution outputs are traceable.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `5ebf41f`.
acceptance_criteria: Expression and execution will expose inventory action, fresh-capital action, and thesis-invalidation state explicitly.
Execution style will remain subordinate to permission and playbook eligibility.
All touched execution code surfaces will retain explicit docstrings.

leaves.title: Import review-and-explanation tranche
leaves.scope: Implement or refactor attribution, conflict, review, and explanation surfaces.
implementation_tasks: Expose reason packets, attribution surfaces, and conflict logs for the rebuilt grammar.
Keep review and explanation first-class rather than post-hoc ornaments.
validation_tasks: Add targeted tests for reason-packet shape, attribution completeness, and conflict reporting.
Add integration tests proving every meaningful decision path is explainable.
test_commands: pytest -q tests -k review or attribution or conflict or explanation
leaves.pass_gate: Review-and-explanation logic reconstructs decisions deterministically, is test-covered on positive and negative paths, and materially increases implemented-runtime depth for the review grammar role.
leaves.merge_gate: Relevant tests pass and trace packets are machine-readable.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `fead161`.
acceptance_criteria: Review and explanation will expose stage summaries, desk readout, and explicit conflict tags.
Reason packets will remain first-class rather than post-hoc ornaments.
All touched review code surfaces will retain explicit docstrings.

leaves.title: Prepare the real-data ingestion scaffold
leaves.scope: Add dataset schemas, loaders, and provenance surfaces for the incoming real-data corpus.
implementation_tasks: Define import contracts for bars, options chains, events, and auxiliary state.
Define provenance requirements and loader behaviour.
Prepare deterministic replay-ready storage for the incoming corpus.
validation_tasks: Add schema and loader tests for the import surfaces.
Add fixture-backed integration tests that prove replay-ready ingestion.
test_commands: pytest -q tests -k loader or dataset or ingest or replay
leaves.pass_gate: The runtime consumes a typed real-data bundle rather than validating one in isolation, preserves provenance, and routes options-chain state into the grammar through typed contracts.
leaves.merge_gate: The repo remains green and every imported dataset path carries provenance.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `3864171`.
acceptance_criteria: The real-data loader will validate bundles and distil bars plus option chains into runtime-ready snapshots.
Loader provenance will remain explicit.
All touched real-data ingestion code surfaces will retain explicit docstrings.

leaves.title: Prepare replay, calibration, and comparison harnesses
leaves.scope: Extend the runtime so it can support repeated deterministic runs, coefficient tuning, and stack comparison under governance.
implementation_tasks: Define replay and comparison entrypoints.
Support coefficient and sub-coefficient tuning without violating the grammar.
Define stable metrics for calibration, veto quality, deployable-capital discipline, and explanation quality.
validation_tasks: Add targeted tests for deterministic reruns and metric stability.
Add integration tests for replay and comparison scaffolding.
test_commands: pytest -q tests -k replay or calibration or compare or tuning
leaves.pass_gate: Replay and calibration use module weights and sub-coefficients in runtime evaluation, compare explicit stack definitions, and encode walk-forward and holdout discipline.
leaves.merge_gate: The repo remains green and calibration/comparison metrics are reproducible.
leaves.completion_note: Completed on main in the historical sequential rebuild pass; implementation commit `7d1aeef`.
acceptance_criteria: Replay and comparison harnesses will support coefficient sets, stack identifiers, enabled-playbook filtering, and module-weight effects deterministically.
Calibration metrics will expose veto quality, deployable-capital discipline, active-playbook depth, and conflict counts.
All touched replay and calibration code surfaces will retain explicit docstrings.
